shell.disclaimer: Guidance only — not legal or tax advice.

footer.because: You’re getting this because you have a Get Camino roadmap.

welcome.subject: Welcome to Get Camino — your road to Spain starts here
welcome.what: Get Camino turns your move to Spain into a step-by-step roadmap: every visa, form and deadline that applies to your situation, in the right order, each one backed by an official source.
welcome.whatText: Get Camino turns your move to Spain into a step-by-step roadmap: every visa, form and deadline that applies to your situation, in the right order, backed by official sources.
welcome.lives: Your roadmap lives here — it updates as your plans change, and I’ll coach you through any step you tap:
welcome.weekly: While your move is underway I’ll send a short weekly roundup — what’s coming up, what’s slipped, never more than a handful of tasks.
welcome.weeklyText: While your move is underway I’ll send a short weekly roundup — never more than a handful of tasks.

roundup.subjectOverdue: Your Get Camino week: {{overdue}} overdue, {{upcoming}} coming up
roundup.subjectOne: Your Get Camino week: one thing coming up
roundup.subjectMany: Your Get Camino week: {{count}} things coming up
roundup.intro: Hola — here’s where your road to Spain stands this week.
roundup.reflow: Already done one of these? Mark it done with the real date and your plan re-flows. Plans changed? Tell me what happened and I’ll remodel the roadmap.
roundup.more: …and {{count}} more after these — one step at a time.

nudge.subject: Your Spain roadmap is waiting — a few questions to go
nudge.body: You started telling me about your move to Spain, and I’d hate for that head start to go to waste. A few more answers and I can lay out your full roadmap — every step that applies to you, in the right order, with real deadlines.
nudge.button: Pick up where you left off
nudge.note: It usually takes two or three minutes. Your earlier answers are saved.
nudge.bodyText: You started telling me about your move to Spain. A few more answers and I can lay out your full roadmap.
nudge.textOpen: Pick up where you left off: {{url}}

digest.penaltySuffix: Missing it can trigger a financial penalty.

report.title: Get Camino — your road to Spain
report.footerHonesty: Estimated dates sharpen as real dates are confirmed; steps without dates begin once their milestone happens — Get Camino never invents a deadline.
report.footerMade: Made with Get Camino (getcamino.app). Guidance only — not legal or tax advice; a gestor signs the papers.

feedbackAck.subject: We got your message — Get Camino
feedbackAck.reply: Get Camino is built and answered by one person, so a reply usually takes about four to five days. If something is time-sensitive, your consulate's appointment page (cita previa) is the fastest route — I can't help with urgent cases.
feedbackAck.meantime: In the meantime, these might already have your answer:
